name: Ab Tak Manual Eval Set
description: 5 standard news tasks for evaluating bulletin quality

tasks.task: Cover the top global stories from the last 2 hours
tasks.notes: Standard baseline test - should capture major world news with good variety

tasks.task: Report on technology and AI developments from today
tasks.notes: Tech-focused - should identify actual tech news and explain concepts clearly for audio

tasks.task: Summarize breaking news about international relations and diplomacy
tasks.notes: Diplomacy focus - should handle nuanced stories with proper context and multiple viewpoints

tasks.task: Cover economic and market news from the past 4 hours
tasks.notes: Business/economics - should include specific figures, market movements, and explain significance

tasks.task: Report on science, health, and environment stories from today
tasks.notes: Science/health focus - should explain technical topics in accessible audio format

scoring_guide.depth: 1-10: Presence of specific facts, figures, named sources, and detailed context
scoring_guide.accuracy: 1-10: Claims are traceable to sources, no factual errors
scoring_guide.clarity: 1-10: Free of jargon, well-structured, easy to understand
scoring_guide.newsworthiness: 1-10: Stories are genuinely significant and current
scoring_guide.audio_readiness: 1-10: Natural spoken flow, proper pacing, works as audio
